description:
The TextExportable component allows the user to take a Slot and export it as a text file on their device.

To export using this component, look at the file browser export section.

fields.TextSource: Anything that is a string, such as textfields, contents, etc.
fields.Description: The description of what this text export is. Will be shown during the export process.

usage: This can be used to export anything that is text based, or anything you can fill the ``TextSource`` with such as log information or anything else that you wish to export out.
